name: DayView
searchText: dayview standalone schedule day view component @mantine/schedule /schedule/day-view alldayslotheight businesshours candragevent canresizeevent date endtime events gettimeslotprops headerformat highlightbusinesshours intervalminutes labels locale mode moreeventsprops nextcontrolprops onalldayslotclick ondatechange oneventclick oneventdragend oneventdragstart oneventdrop oneventresize onexternaleventdrop onslotdragend ontimeslotclick onviewchange previouscontrolprops radius recurrenceexpansionlimit renderevent rendereventbody scrollareaprops slotheight slotlabelformat startscrolltime starttime todaycontrolprops viewselectprops withalldayslot withcurrenttimebubble withcurrenttimeindicator withdragslotselect witheventresize witheventsdraganddrop withheader

props.name: allDaySlotHeight
props.description: Height of all-day slot

props.name: businessHours
props.description: Business hours range in HH:mm:ss format

props.name: canDragEvent
props.description: Function to determine if event can be dragged

props.name: canResizeEvent
props.description: Function to determine if event can be resized

props.name: date
props.description: Day to display, Date object or date string in YYYY-MM-DD format

props.name: endTime
props.description: Time slots end time in HH:mm:ss format

props.name: events
props.description: Events to display, must be a stable reference

props.name: getTimeSlotProps
props.description: Function to get additional props for each time slot. Receives slot start and end datetime strings. Returned props are spread onto the slot element. Event handlers returned by this function are composed with internal handlers (e.g. onClick) rather than overriding them.

type.name: ((data: { start: string; end: string; }) => Record<string, any>) | undefined

props.name: headerFormat
props.description: Date format in the header

props.name: highlightBusinessHours
props.description: If set to true, highlights business hours with white background

props.name: intervalMinutes
props.description: Number of minutes for each time slot

props.name: labels
props.description: Labels override

props.name: locale
props.description: Locale passed down to dayjs, overrides value defined on DatesProvider

props.name: mode
props.description: Interaction mode: 'default' allows all interactions, 'static' disables event interactions

props.name: moreEventsProps
props.description: Props passed down to MoreEvents component

props.name: nextControlProps
props.description: Props passed to next month control

props.name: onAllDaySlotClick
props.description: Called when all-day slot is clicked

props.name: onDateChange
props.description: Called when date is changed

props.name: onEventClick
props.description: Called when event is clicked

props.name: onEventDragEnd
props.description: Called when any event drag ends

props.name: onEventDragStart
props.description: Called when any event drag starts

props.name: onEventDrop
props.description: Called when event is dropped at new time

type.name: (data: { eventId: string | number; newStart: string; newEnd: string; event: ScheduleEventData; }) => void

props.name: onEventResize
props.description: Called when event is resized

type.name: (data: { eventId: string | number; newStart: string; newEnd: string; event: ScheduleEventData; }) => void

props.name: onExternalEventDrop
props.description: Called when an external item is dropped onto the schedule. Receives the DataTransfer object and the drop target datetime.

props.name: onSlotDragEnd
props.description: Called when a time slot range is selected by dragging

props.name: onTimeSlotClick
props.description: Called when time slot is clicked

type.name: (data: { slotStart: string; slotEnd: string; nativeEvent: MouseEvent<HTMLButtonElement, MouseEvent>; }) => void

props.name: onViewChange
props.description: Called when view level select button is clicked

props.name: previousControlProps
props.description: Props passed to previous month control

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius

props.name: recurrenceExpansionLimit
props.description: Max number of generated recurring instances per recurring series

props.name: renderEvent
props.description: Function to fully customize event rendering, receives all props that would be passed to the root element including children

props.name: renderEventBody
props.description: Function to customize event body, event object is passed as first argument

props.name: scrollAreaProps
props.description: Props passed down to the ScrollArea.Autosize component

props.name: slotHeight
props.description: Height of 1hr slot

props.name: slotLabelFormat
props.description: Dayjs format for slot labels or a callback function that returns formatted value

props.name: startScrollTime
props.description: Time to scroll to on initial render, in HH:mm:ss format

props.name: startTime
props.description: Time slots start time, in HH:mm:ss format

props.name: todayControlProps
props.description: Props passed to today control

props.name: viewSelectProps
props.description: Props passed to view level select

props.name: withAllDaySlot
props.description: If set, the all-day slot is displayed below the header

props.name: withCurrentTimeBubble
props.description: If set, the time indicator displays the current time in the bubble

props.name: withCurrentTimeIndicator
props.description: If set, displays a line indicating the current time. By default, displayed only for the current day.

props.name: withDragSlotSelect
props.description: If set, enables drag-to-select time slot ranges

props.name: withEventResize
props.description: If true, events can be resized by dragging their edges

props.name: withEventsDragAndDrop
props.description: If true, events can be dragged and dropped

props.name: withHeader
props.description: If set, the header is displayed
